'''鈭歱-th-v''' ('''pathava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaptalise|chaptalise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-th-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaptalise|chaptalise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-th-v
|-
! Lemma
| pathava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pathavithi|pathavithi]] || [[word:pathaviji|pathaviji]] || [[word:pathavishi|pathavishi]] || [[word:pathavi|pathavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathavuthuth|pathavuthuth]] || [[word:pathavujuj|pathavujuj]] || [[word:pathavushush|pathavushush]] || [[word:pathav|pathav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathavuthu|pathavuthu]] || [[word:pathavuju|pathavuju]] || [[word:pathavushu|pathavushu]] || [[word:pathavu|pathavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathavufuth|pathavufuth]] || [[word:pathavufuj|pathavufuj]] || [[word:pathavufush|pathavufush]] || [[word:pathavuf|pathavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pathavethe|pathavethe]] || [[word:pathaveje|pathaveje]] || [[word:pathaveshe|pathaveshe]] || [[word:pathave|pathave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathavothoth|pathavothoth]] || [[word:pathavojoj|pathavojoj]] || [[word:pathavoshosh|pathavoshosh]] || [[word:pathav|pathav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathavotho|pathavotho]] || [[word:pathavojo|pathavojo]] || [[word:pathavosho|pathavosho]] || [[word:pathavo|pathavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathavofoth|pathavofoth]] || [[word:pathavofoj|pathavofoj]] || [[word:pathavofosh|pathavofosh]] || [[word:pathavof|pathavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pathav忙th忙|pathav忙th忙]] || [[word:pathav忙j忙|pathav忙j忙]] || [[word:pathav忙sh忙|pathav忙sh忙]] || [[word:pathav忙|pathav忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pathavathath|pathavathath]] || [[word:pathavajaj|pathavajaj]] || [[word:pathavashash|pathavashash]] || [[word:pathav|pathav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pathavatha|pathavatha]] || [[word:pathavaja|pathavaja]] || [[word:pathavasha|pathavasha]] || [[word:pathava|pathava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pathavafath|pathavafath]] || [[word:pathavafaj|pathavafaj]] || [[word:pathavafash|pathavafash]] || [[word:pathavaf|pathavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:pathavasha|pathavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopathavasha|gopathavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipathavasha|gokipathavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:pathavn眉sha|pathavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopathavnkn眉sha|gopathavnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipathavn眉sha|gokipathavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pathavsh毛sha|pathavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopathavnksh毛sha|gopathavnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipathavsh毛sha|gokipathavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pathavrosha|pathavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopathavnkrosha|gopathavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipathavrosha|gokipathavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pathavmusha|pathavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopathavnkmusha|gopathavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathavmusha|gokipathavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:pathavsherasha|pathavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopathavnksherasha|gopathavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipathavsherasha|gokipathavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:pathavngasha|pathavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopathavnkngasha|gopathavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipathavngasha|gokipathavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pathavyasha|pathavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopathavnkyasha|gopathavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipathavyasha|gokipathavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:pathavyamasha|pathavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopathavnkyamasha|gopathavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipathavyamasha|gokipathavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:pathavn眉sh毛sha|pathavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopathavnkn眉sh毛sha|gopathavnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipathavn眉sh毛sha|gokipathavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pathavn眉rosha|pathavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopathavnkn眉rosha|gopathavnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipathavn眉rosha|gokipathavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pathavn眉musha|pathavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopathavnkn眉musha|gopathavnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathavn眉musha|gokipathavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:pathavsh毛n眉sha|pathavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopathavnksh毛n眉sha|gopathavnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipathavsh毛n眉sha|gokipathavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pathavsh毛rosha|pathavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopathavnksh毛rosha|gopathavnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipathavsh毛rosha|gokipathavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pathavsh毛musha|pathavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopathavnksh毛musha|gopathavnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathavsh毛musha|gokipathavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:pathavron眉sha|pathavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopathavnkron眉sha|gopathavnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipathavron眉sha|gokipathavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:pathavrosh毛sha|pathavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopathavnkrosh毛sha|gopathavnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipathavrosh毛sha|gokipathavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pathavromusha|pathavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopathavnkromusha|gopathavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathavromusha|gokipathavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:pathavmun眉sha|pathavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopathavnkmun眉sha|gopathavnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipathavmun眉sha|gokipathavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:pathavmush毛sha|pathavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopathavnkmush毛sha|gopathavnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipathavmush毛sha|gokipathavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pathavmurosha|pathavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopathavnkmurosha|gopathavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipathavmurosha|gokipathavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:pathav|pathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:p忙th忙v|p忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopathav|hopathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hop忙th忙v|hop忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopathav|hohopathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohop忙th忙v|hohop忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉pathav|n眉pathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉p忙th忙v|n眉p忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉pathav|n眉n眉pathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉p忙th忙v|n眉n眉p忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂pathav|n茂pathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂p忙th忙v|n茂p忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂pathav|n茂n茂pathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂p忙th忙v|n茂n茂p忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupathav|lupathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lup忙th忙v|lup忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupathav|lulupathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulup忙th忙v|lulup忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipathav|lipathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lip忙th忙v|lip忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipathav|lilipathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilip忙th忙v|lilip忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopathav|kopathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kop忙th忙v|kop忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopathav|kokopathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokop忙th忙v|kokop忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepathav|kepathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kep忙th忙v|kep忙th忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepathav|kekepathav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekep忙th忙v|kekep忙th忙v]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
